title: podman play kube does not apply labels
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

I'm trying to use the auto-update feature of podman and added the `io.containers.autoupdate: registry` label to my pod definition, however `podman play kube` does not apply it, the label does not appear in `podman ps`.

My Kube YAML: https://paste.xinu.at/7u47JTC9DpO4zcON/

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. Add the `io.containers.autoupdate: registry` label to a pod

2. Play the kube file with `podman play kube`

3. Notice the label does not appear in `podman ps -a --format "{{.Names}} {{.Labels}}"`

**Describe the results you received:**

No label so auto-update is unusable.

**Describe the results you expected:**

Label should be added and auto-update be usable.

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

I followed this guide, replacing `image` with `registry` as it seems `image` is deprecated: https://www.jwillikers.com/automatically-update-podman-containers

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:      3.1.2
API Version:  3.1.2
Go Version:   go1.16.3
Git Commit:   51b8ddbc22cf5b10dd76dd9243924aa66ad7db39
Built:        Wed Apr 21 23:34:03 2021
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide? (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/troubleshooting.md)**

Yes

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

comments.body: Will be fixed in 3.2.0, thanks to @EduardoVega
